StructurePhase.Reference: Rogl P., Handb. Phys. Chem. Rare Earths, v7 p1 (1984)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1710176. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: Original Max Intensity 999.0 < 1000.0. Article Title: Phase equilibria in ternary and higher order systems with rare earth elements and silicon. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: c3. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Rossi D., Marazza R., Ferro R., J. Less-Common Met., v58 p203 (1978)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO2P2. LPF Collection Code: 300966. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Y,Co,Si. Compound Preparation: induction-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 773 K for 1 w. Article Title: LATTICE PARAMETERS OF SOME ThCu2Si2-TYPE PHASES IN TERNARY ALLOYS OF RARE EARTHS WITH COBALT (OR IRON) AND SILICON (OR GERMANIUM). Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: e d a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Rudman R., Inorg. Chem., v5 p1823 (1966)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 1903714. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIAL:Ga,B.Compound Formation:heated at 1373-1573 K for 24 h.CRUCIBLE: sealed evacuated quartz tube. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment:compound GaB12 reported in Comptes Rendus Hebdomadaires des Seances de l`Academie des Sciences (1961) 252, 134 does not exist. Article Title: On the Reported Synthesis of Gallium Dodecaboride. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factors reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Single Crystal.
